papers.title: Attention Is All You Need
papers.abstract: The dominant sequence transduction models are based on complex recurrent or convolutional neural networks...
papers.summary: 提出了 Transformer 架构，完全基于注意力机制，无需循环和卷积。

papers.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
papers.abstract: We introduce a new language representation model called BERT...
papers.summary: 提出 BERT 模型，通过双向 Transformer 进行预训练。
